series_metadata.series_description: Calculated annually for each school district by Tax Equalization for use in state school aid formula (R.C. 3317.028(A)).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five years after the tax year to which these certifications apply. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Five years after the tax year to which these certifications apply., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
